productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Wow Woven Purple Shirts
description: Composition Purple shirt made of 100% cotton, with puff sleeves and a foldover hem held together by a buttoned flap, pleats over the bust line, full buttoned placket and curved hemline   Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash in cold water Use mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Get back to the basics with this purple shirt from scullers. The contoured seams and the short puff and foldover hem sleeves makes this shirt a great choice for everyday wear. Team it with denims, brown leather boots and chunky silver jewellery for a really cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
